recipe.title: Quick seafood pasta
recipe.description: You can’t beat a good seafood linguine and this recipe is super-quick and delicious.

steps.descr: Cook 300g of dried linguine in a large pan of boiling...
steps.instructions: Cook 300g of dried linguine in a large pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of starchy water.

on_enter.say: Cook 300g of dried linguine in a large pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of starchy water.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, slice 250g of squid into 1cm rings, sort...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, slice 250g of squid into 1cm rings, sort through 250g of mussels and 250g of cockles (or clams), giving any that aren’t tightly closed a tap. If they don’t close, discard them. Slice the 4 scallops.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, slice 250g of squid into 1cm rings, sort through 250g of mussels and 250g of cockles (or clams), giving any that aren’t tightly closed a tap. If they don’t close, discard them. Slice the 4 scallops.

steps.descr: Peel and finely slice 1 clove of garlic, pick and finely...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely slice 1 clove of garlic, pick and finely chop 1 bunch of fresh flat-leaf parsley (30g), and finely grate the zest of ½ a lemon. Trim and finely chop 1 fresh red chilli (if using).

on_enter.say: Peel and finely slice 1 clove of garlic, pick and finely chop 1 bunch of fresh flat-leaf parsley (30g), and finely grate the zest of ½ a lemon. Trim and finely chop 1 fresh red chilli (if using).

steps.descr: Place a large non-stick pan on a medium-high heat with 1...
steps.instructions: Place a large non-stick pan on a medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Add the garlic, chilli and 1 tablespoon of baby capers, cook for 1 minute, then add the clams and mussels. Cook for a couple of minutes, then add the squid, scallops, lemon zest and parsley, and give it a good stir.

on_enter.say: Place a large non-stick pan on a medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Add the garlic, chilli and 1 tablespoon of baby capers, cook for 1 minute, then add the clams and mussels. Cook for a couple of minutes, then add the squid, scallops, lemon zest and parsley, and give it a good stir.

steps.descr: Scrunch in 1 x 400g tin of plum tomatoes through your...
steps.instructions: Scrunch in 1 x 400g tin of plum tomatoes through your clean hands, bring to the boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 2 minutes to let the flavours mingle, stirring regularly and breaking up the tomatoes.

on_enter.say: Scrunch in 1 x 400g tin of plum tomatoes through your clean hands, bring to the boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 2 minutes to let the flavours mingle, stirring regularly and breaking up the tomatoes.

steps.descr: Stir in 1 handful of samphire (if using) and squeeze in...
steps.instructions: Stir in 1 handful of samphire (if using) and squeeze in the juice of ½ a lemon. Give the pan a jiggle and simmer for 1 minute more, or until perfectly cooked (discarding any shells that remain closed).

on_enter.say: Stir in 1 handful of samphire (if using) and squeeze in the juice of ½ a lemon. Give the pan a jiggle and simmer for 1 minute more, or until perfectly cooked (discarding any shells that remain closed).

steps.descr: Remove the pan from the heat and carefully pick the meat...
steps.instructions: Remove the pan from the heat and carefully pick the meat out of the shells, if you like.

on_enter.say: Remove the pan from the heat and carefully pick the meat out of the shells, if you like.

steps.descr: Grate in 20g of Parmesan, then taste and season to...
steps.instructions: Grate in 20g of Parmesan, then taste and season to perfection, adding an extra squeeze of lemon juice, if needed.

on_enter.say: Grate in 20g of Parmesan, then taste and season to perfection, adding an extra squeeze of lemon juice, if needed.

steps.descr: Toss the pasta into the sauce, loosening with a splash...
steps.instructions: Toss the pasta into the sauce, loosening with a splash of pasta water, if needed, then finish with a kiss of extra virgin olive oil.

on_enter.say: Toss the pasta into the sauce, loosening with a splash of pasta water, if needed, then finish with a kiss of extra virgin olive oil.
